overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a hooded protagonist running through a historic Middle Eastern city at dusk. The character navigates from open sandy areas up stone stairs, through narrow scaffolding-lined streets, under illuminated archways, and into open market squares with warm torchlight and scattered NPCs.

events.description: character begins ascending wide stone staircase
reaches top of stairs and transitions to wooden plank platform

agents.ego_description: running through open sandy area lined with palm trees and ascending wide stone stairs toward an elevated platform

notable_agents.action: male pedestrian walking ahead toward the staircase

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the approach
wide stone staircase with multiple steps leading upward
historic stone buildings with flat roofs and small windows
historic stone buildings with wooden architectural elements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide sandy area with palm trees flanking the path. The protagonist runs toward and ascends a broad stone staircase, transitioning onto an elevated wooden platform. Historic stone buildings frame the scene on both sides as the character approaches the entrance to a narrow street.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow construction alley with wooden scaffolding

agents.ego_description: running through narrow alleyway flanked by tall wooden scaffolding on both sides, approaching a large stone archway

notable_agents.action: woman in dark dress walking alongside the protagonist toward the archway

entered.detail: tall wooden construction scaffolding with cross beams lining the left side
tall wooden construction scaffolding with ladders lining the right side
large illuminated stone archway marking the end of the passage

segments.scene_description: The scene narrows into a confined alleyway enclosed by wooden construction scaffolding on both sides. The ground shifts to dirt as the protagonist runs toward a distant illuminated stone archway. A woman in dark clothing walks alongside, and the historic stone buildings now loom closer on either side.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone passage through historic archway

events.description: passes through illuminated stone archway into covered corridor
exits covered passage and turns right into open area

agents.ego_description: running through the stone archway into a torch-lit covered corridor, then emerging and turning right into an open plaza

notable_agents.action: group of armed guards standing near the archway exit

entered.detail: stone-covered corridor with high ceilings and wall-mounted lighting
illuminated wall-mounted torches casting warm light
illuminated wall-mounted torches casting warm light
wooden market carts loaded with goods and barrels

segments.scene_description: The protagonist passes through the large stone archway into a covered corridor illuminated by wall-mounted torches. The environment shifts from open to enclosed with stone flooring. After emerging from the passage, the character turns right into a more open area where wooden market carts become visible and armed guards stand near the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market square with domed structure

agents.ego_description: running through open market area with scattered groups of NPCs and market carts, approaching a large domed building

notable_agents.action: person leading a camel or horse near the domed structure

entered.detail: large stone building with prominent dome and arched entryways
wooden market stalls with fabric awnings and displayed goods
palm trees visible in the background against the dusk sky

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide market square with a dusty atmosphere and warm torchlight. A prominent domed building rises on the left while wooden market stalls and carts occupy the right side. The protagonist runs through the open area where groups of NPCs gather, and a person with a camel stands near the domed structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open sandy plaza into the confined corridors of a historic city, eventually opening into a bustling market square. It begins in a wide area flanked by palm trees, following the protagonist as they ascend a broad stone staircase and move onto an elevated wooden platform. As the path narrows, the scene shifts into a confined dirt alleyway enclosed by wooden scaffolding and looming stone buildings, leading the character toward a distant illuminated archway. The camera then follows the protagonist through this archway into a torch-lit covered corridor before turning right into a more open space populated by wooden carts and armed guards. Finally, the environment expands into a wide, dusty market square where warm torchlight illuminates a prominent domed building, scattered market stalls, and groups of NPCs.
